title: Cobblemon Hold My Pokéballs
description: Make your pokeballs look good with the Hold My Items Mod!
body: For those who wish to use the Hold My Items mod with Cobblemon, this resource pack attempts to fix it! Requires Hold My Items 1.21+. All Textures and Models were taken from the Cobblemon Mod and modified to look better with HMI![With this Pack, both types of balls look like this](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dce6102950750570992c7c43153b68c23c335b45.png)
